name: Real Chicken Shawarma Wrap
purpose: Actual wrapped and toasted shawarma-style lunch.
instructions: Warm lavash briefly so it folds without tearing.
Spread Garlic Yogurt Sauce in a thin layer.
Add chicken, vegetables, optional feta, and optional pickles.
Fold sides in and roll tightly.
Toast seam-side down in pan 2 minutes per side or Ninja 190°C for 4-5 minutes.
storage: Do not store assembled wrap for days.
reheating: Reheat chicken before assembling; toast finished wrap briefly.
substitutions: Turkey chili mince can replace chicken if chicken runs out, but then it is not chicken shawarma.
why_it_fits_weekly_plan: High-protein, filling, and actually matches the wrap/shawarma format.
